flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at AdventHealth University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at AdventHealth University are 52% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($72.3k vs $47.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at AdventHealth University rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 1.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at AdventHealth University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (54.3% → 64.0%).
